subject: Accounting
title: Anonymous Reporting Channels
description: A fast breakdown of Anonymous Reporting Channels for builders.

hook.text: A hotline call at 2 AM: 'My manager is falsifying expense reports.' No name given.

buildup.text: Companies set up anonymous hotlines and web portals so employees can report concerns safely.

discovery.text: Research shows that tips are the number one way fraud is detected—more than audits or controls.

twist.text: But if companies don't act on anonymous tips, the channel becomes useless—and trust evaporates.

climax.text: Effective hotlines are confidential, accessible, and followed up with genuine investigation.

punchline.text: The best fraud detector isn't software. It's a safe place to speak.

quiz.question: What is the number one way fraud is detected?
